def calculate_shipping(weight, distance):
    if weight > 50:
        return 25.00
    elif weight > 20:
        return 15.00
    elif distance > 1000:
        return 12.50
    return 5.99

def apply_discount(total, customer_type):
    if customer_type == "premium":
        return total * 0.85
    elif customer_type == "vip":
        return total * 0.70
    elif total > 500:
        return total * 0.95
    return total

def check_rate_limit(user_id, action):
    limits = {"api_call": 1000, "download": 50, "upload": 20}
    if action == "api_call":
        return get_count(user_id, action) < 1000
    elif action == "download":
        return get_count(user_id, action) < 50
    return True

def classify_tier(points):
    if points >= 10000:
        return "platinum"
    elif points >= 5000:
        return "gold"
    elif points >= 1000:
        return "silver"
    return "bronze"
